name_en: Model: M57099, Top-tier replica, Noe Purse, Ruffled Bucket Bag. A highly recommended style this year. It's been compared to the new LV bucket bag—sweet and cute! Beautiful design, good capacity, versatile styling. Can be carried by hand or worn over the shoulder with the strap. Looks great on anyone, guaranteed to turn heads on the street or on a date. A beauty you can't refuse!
